productDisplayName: Force 10 Men Navy Blue Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteSporty fashion never looked this good! This pair of performance oriented force 10 shoes is the right choice to complement your casual weekend wear. The brand's shoes have always made the cut when it comes to off-duty dressing - this pair refines that look for you. This shoe is also great for a fun run in the sun!Product DetailsNavy blue round toed shoe with a tough fabric upperHas central lace-ups with a padded tongue and innerHas a haul loop at the heel with branding at the upper midfootThick foamy rubber midsoleTPR outsole with aggressive lugs and an upraised heelMaterial and CareFabricWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
